task_completion.description: Create a forensic case in Autopsy with the specified name and number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI is open and displays the case name 'Directory_Profile_2024' and case number 'INV-DSP-007' in the title bar, case details, or case creation wizard.

task_completion.description: Add the specified disk image as a data source.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI shows 'ntfs_undel.dd' listed as a data source in the tree view on the left or in the data source summary.

task_completion.description: Enable only the 'File Type Identification' ingest module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Autopsy Ingest Modules configuration step showing only 'File Type Identification' checked, or an ingest progress bar indicating only this module is running.

task_completion.description: Generate the directory tree text file with the correct format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/directory_tree.txt'. The content must be pipe-delimited, start with the header 'DEPTH|ENTRY_TYPE|NAME|FULL_PATH|SIZE_BYTES', and contain rows of file/directory entries.

task_completion.description: Generate the organizational profile text file with the required sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/organization_profile.txt'. The content must include sections like 'VOLUME_FILESYSTEM:', 'TOTAL_DIRECTORIES:', 'TOTAL_FILES:', 'FILE_EXTENSION_DISTRIBUTION:', and 'ORGANIZATIONAL_ASSESSMENT:'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Autopsy GUI to analyze the disk image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Autopsy application interface, not just terminal commands or scripts bypassing the forensic tool.

integrity.description: The generated reports contain actual data extracted from the disk image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text files contain realistic numbers, file paths, and extensions derived from an NTFS image, rather than empty templates or placeholder text.

integrity.description: The reports are saved in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor title bar, file manager, or terminal commands confirm the files are located in '/home/ga/Reports/'.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Case Name: Directory_Profile_2024
Case Number: INV-DSP-007
Disk Image: /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd
Tree File: /home/ga/Reports/directory_tree.txt
Profile File: /home/ga/Reports/organization_profile.txt
